notes.body: Bobby & Team Dixie, Congratulations on your 100% shop last week! Keep them coming! — Brad Davis, Director of Operations.

Halo Effect & Suggestive Sales Policy — ALL employees sign by FRIDAY 5/8/26 5:00 PM. Email signed forms to Crystal (chess@estep-co.com). Orientation Checklist begins with ALL new hires now. FGU Overdue Rate — Dixie at 13%, push to 0% by 5/15.

New synopsis — Weekly Synopsis.xlsx attached. Pull it and review the week's KPIs before her in-store visit this week. Standing: print 2065 Shopper Dashboard & K.P.I., post on comm board, be ready to discuss in-store.

Dixie Highway scored 100.0% on 5/01 shop. On shift: Bobby Cline, Francisco Llorente Mejias, Lidy Henry, Madison Cureton, Vicki Lucey. Brad called it out in writing this morning. Shop tracker refreshed.
REMINDER: Store Action Request — Additional Info Needed: Produce – Jalapeno (incident #26-1). Open the ticket and respond today.
Three system messages on Request #9489 / 2065 Dixie Highway, opened by Naomi Collins (Estep & Co.) on your behalf. Read the thread for context.
